fields.title: Build custom memory renderer similar to beads
fields.description:
Create a custom renderer for memory tool output similar to how beads renders issues.

Acceptance criteria:
- Colorized output with TUI components
- Shows id, scope, preview of content, size
- Progress bar for memory usage
- Styled similar to beads list/show commands
fields.notes: Implemented memory tool renderer in src/memory/renderer.ts and integrated it in src/memory/index.ts. Successful memory results now include structured details for action/scope/entry/bucket usage, and render colorized TUI output with id, scope, preview, size, and a usage progress bar styled after beads. Verification: npm run gate passed in extensions/tau/ (typecheck, lint, tests: 187/187).
fields.close_reason: Implemented: custom memory renderer with colorized output, progress bar, styled like beads
